title: Compound Subjunctive: Presente Perfecto & Pluscuamperfecto de Subjuntivo
summary: Haya and hubiera/hubiese plus a past participle, the sequence-of-tense logic that matches each compound subjunctive form to its main clause's tense, ojalá plus the pluperfect subjunctive for unrealized past regret, and a clear three-way contrast between hubiera/hubiese, había, and habría.
